node_21.excerpt: The Go compiler itself has been rebuilt with PGO enabled for 1 . 21 , and
node_21.fallbackText: The Go compiler itself has been rebuilt with PGO enabled for 1.21, and as a result it builds Go programs 2-4% faster, depending on the host architecture.
